bands.name: YELLOW
bands.meaning: Drift present; freeze high-risk change operations.
required_actions: Record failed-question IDs and remediation owner in governance ledger.
Attach evidence artifact for each failed question.
Produce one subsequent snapshot with score >= 13.

bands.name: ORANGE
bands.meaning: Unstable; freeze all change and outward side-effect operations.
required_actions: Open incident record with root cause and remediation plan.
Attach evidence artifact for each failed question.
Produce two consecutive snapshots with score >= 10 and latest score >= 13.

bands.name: RED
required_actions: Enter containment incident state in governance ledger.
Run stability_snapshot and ledger_integrity_sweep; both must complete successfully.
Attach evidence artifact for each failed question.
Produce three consecutive snapshots with score >= 10 and latest score >= 13.

overrides.rule: Break-glass override valid only when band in {ORANGE,RED}, operation in override_allowlist, expiry_utc > now_utc, (expiry_utc - utc_timestamp) <= expiry_max_hours, and no other unexpired override exists for same operation.

notes: Policy gate decision is deterministic: compute band from score, then allow only if operation is not blocked for that band or a valid override exists.
Block semantics are strict: if operation is listed in blocked_operations for current band, gate returns allow=false unless valid override.
Unknown operation IDs are denied when band is ORANGE or RED.
No changes to existing ledger event schema are required; override records are additive governance entries.
